Functions for initializing and managing watchface events and settings in the Pebble firmware.

# Purpose
This C header file declares functions related to the management and operation of a watch face application. The function [`watchface_init`](<#watchface_init>) initializes the watch face. The [`watchface_handle_button_event`](<#watchface_handle_button_event>) function processes button events, taking a pointer to a `PebbleEvent` structure as an argument. The [`watchface_get_default_install_id`](<#watchface_get_default_install_id>) function returns the default installation ID of the watch face as an `AppInstallId`. The [`watchface_launch_default`](<#watchface_launch_default>) function launches the default watch face with a specified `CompositorTransition` animation. The [`watchface_set_timeline_peek_enabled`](<#watchface_set_timeline_peek_enabled>) function enables or disables the timeline peek feature based on the `visible` parameter. Lastly, the [`watchface_reset_click_manager`](<#watchface_reset_click_manager>) function resets the click manager associated with the watch face.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `kernel/events.h`
- `process_management/app_install_manager.h`
- `services/common/compositor/compositor.h`
